message:
Fix macOS build failures: un-gate systemd module, fix IdentityQuality::Moderate

The systemd module was gated behind #[cfg(target_os = "linux")] but its
types (SystemdUnit, SystemdUnitType) are used unconditionally by
SupervisorInfo in prechecks.rs. Since the module contains only pure data
types and Command::new("systemctl") calls that gracefully return
None/false when systemctl is absent, removing the gate is safe and
allows cross-platform compilation.

Also fixes IdentityQuality::Moderate (nonexistent variant) in macos.rs
by replacing it with NoBootId, which accurately reflects macOS's lack
of /proc/boot_id for TOCTOU protection.

Fixes #2

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
